narrative:
Beavercreek 006 (precinct in Greene County) has 1,182 registered voters, with 49.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.4 percentage points.
